description: This file defines the main page component of a note-taking application's front-end. It manages states for notes, tags, theme, and user interactions, and renders the app layout including sidebar, topbar, note list, editor, and settings modal. It also handles data fetching, autosaving, filtering, and user authentication flows.

methods.name: refreshTags
methods.description: Fetches the list of tags from the backend API and updates the local state.

methods.name: refreshNotes
methods.description: Fetches the list of notes based on current filters and updates the local notes state.

methods.name: scheduleAutosave
methods.description: Sets up a debounced autosave operation for note changes, updating the backend and local state.

methods.name: onNewNote
methods.description: Creates a new note with default values and updates local state.

methods.name: onDelete
methods.description: Deletes a note by its ID and updates local state.

methods.name: onTogglePinned
methods.description: Toggles the pinned status of a note and updates it via API.

methods.name: onCreateTag
methods.description: Creates a new tag via API and refreshes the tag list.

methods.name: onDeleteTag
methods.description: Deletes a tag by its ID, updates active tag if necessary, and refreshes tags and notes.
